title: What Do You Want To See On The TVs This Fall?
excerpt: We want to make sure that everyone’s able to watch their favourite teams on the TVs this fall while relaxing after interclub or catching up on some work in the lounge. Let us know what your favourite is, or let us know what you want to see in the comments below. And the winner is…. … Read more
content:
We want to make sure that everyone’s able to watch their favourite teams on the TVs this fall while relaxing after interclub or catching up on some work in the lounge. Let us know what your favourite is, or let us know what you want to see in the comments below.

And the winner is….

Squash TV!
